name: Bold collegiate varsity block
example_pairing: 'Certified Cobra Chicken' needs varsity block — the font says 'official', the content says 'absurd'

name: Heavy clean sans-serif
example_pairing: 'Sorry I'm Late / Avoiding Non-Preferred Tasks' needs clean sans-serif — clinical precision matches the therapy-speak register

name: Wide retro geometric
example_pairing: 'Honk. Hiss. Cause Problems.' needs wide geometric — the wobbly spacing mirrors the chaos

name: Uneven hand-drawn distressed
example_pairing: 'OH NO' in distressed lettering sells the panic visually — the letters look as unhinged as the feeling

name: Uniform block monospace
example_pairing: 'Diagnosed With Main Character Syndrome' in monospace is the joke — fake medical certificate energy

name: Chunky slab serif
example_pairing: 'I Told You So' in slab serif feels permanent and final — unwelcome advice engraved in stone

name: Condensed all-caps impact
example_pairing: 'NOPE' in condensed impact leaves no room for discussion — the font is the rejection

name: Bouncy irregular mixed-case
example_pairing: 'Wait What' in bouncy mixed-case reads as genuine bafflement — the font tilts mirror the mental confusion
